terms.example: Amazon is proud to be a platform partner with Lean In, a non-profit organization committed to offering women the encouragement and support to achieve their goals.
We track the representation of our workforce because we know that diversity helps us build the best possible customer experiences and products for our globally diverse customer base.
We track the representation of our workforce because we know that diversity helps us build the best possible customer experiences and products for our globally diverse customer base.

high_scoring_sentences.text: At Amazon, we believe that every day is still Day One.
And your day to join a company that redefines itself every day.
We hire the world’s brightest minds and offer them an environment in which they can relentlessly improve the experience for our customers.
We hire the world's brightest minds and offer them an environment in which they can invent and innovate to improve the experience for our customers.
We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth’s most customer-centric company.
We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth's most customer-centric company.
We do this every day by solving complex technical and business problems with ingenuity and simplicity.
We’ve revolutionized the online shopping experience, cloud computing and the book… join us and see what’s next!
Every day across the world we develop the ideas, the services and the products that make life easier for tens of millions of customers, and good things happen faster.
Invention is in our DNA and technology is the fundamental tool we wield to evolve and improve every aspect of the experience we provide our customers - Jeff Bezos, 2010 Shareholder letter.
Amazon’s evolution from Web site to e-commerce partner to development platform is driven by the spirit of innovation that is part of our DNA.
Amazon's evolution from Web site to e-commerce partner to development platform is driven by the spirit of invention that is part of our DNA.
We’re making history and the good news is that we’ve only just begun.
We're making history and the good news is that we've only just begun.
We hire the world's brightest minds and offer them an environment in which they can invent and innovate to improve the experience for our customers.
We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth's most customer-centric company.
We do this every day by solving complex technical and business problems with ingenuity and simplicity.
Invention is in our DNA and technology is the fundamental tool we wield to evolve and improve every aspect of the experience we provide our customers - Jeff Bezos, 2010 Shareholder letter.
Amazon's evolution from Web site to e-commerce partner to development platform is driven by the spirit of invention that is part of our DNA.
We're making history and the good news is that we've only just begun.
And there’s still more to do: We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth’s most customer-centric company.
Amazon is proud to be a platform partner with Lean In, a non-profit organization committed to offering women the encouragement and support to achieve their goals.
We’d like your input on creating a new Global Careers Website!
And because the Candidate is our Customer, we want to hear from you—what improvements would you like to see, and what would make it easier for you to find and apply for the right job?
We’re rebuilding our Careers site from the ground up, to make it easier for job-seekers to learn about the many opportunities available with Amazon, and apply for jobs online with less hassle.
We are a federation of startups, each one working to build the best solution to unique problems.
And there’s still more to do: Amazonians are leaning into the future, with radical and transformational innovations that create value for thousands of authors, entrepreneurs, and developers.
Visit Lean In's partner page to see Amazon's Partner Profile, including stories of Amazonians who have successfully "Leaned In" to their careers with us.
It’s what we do, every day — and the good news is that we’ve only just begun.

I’m extremely proud of the whole team, and feel lucky to have a front row seat. —Jeff Bezos, 2011 Letter to Shareholders We want you to help share and shape our mission to be Earth’s most customer-centric company.
Join us, and you’ll not only see the future, you’ll create it.
Invention has become second nature at Amazon, and in my view the team’s pace of innovation is even accelerating — I can assure you it’s very energizing.
Click here to go to our careers site suggestion form.
People who are innovative; people who enjoy solving complex problems with ingenuity and simplicity.

Play the amazon.jobs game, and guess what words really inspire us every day.
There are many things to consider when deciding on your next employer.
It's our job to make bold bets, and we get our energy from inventing on behalf of customers.
For today’s pioneers, that’s exactly why there’s no place on Earth they’d rather build than Amazon.
We are a company of builders who bring varying backgrounds, ideas, and points of view to inventing on behalf of our customers.
Our diverse perspectives come from many sources including gender, race, age, national origin, sexual orientation, culture, education, as well as professional and life experience.
We work on behalf of our people to invent mechanisms for development like Career Choice.
We are working to develop leaders and shape future talent pools to help us meet the needs of our customers around the world.
It's our job to make bold bets, and we get our energy from inventing on behalf of customers.

Leaders raise the performance bar with every hire and promotion.
They recognize exceptional talent, and willingly move them throughout the organization.
Each of these groups has different needs, and we always work to meet those needs, innovating new solutions to make things easier, faster, better, and more cost-effective.
They act on behalf of the entire company, beyond just their own team.
They work vigorously to earn and keep customer trust.
Leaders are obligated to respectfully challenge decisions when they disagree, even when doing so is uncomfortable or exhausting.

As we do new things, we accept that we may be misunderstood for long periods of time.
They are externally aware, look for new ideas from everywhere, and are not limited by “not invented here".

They think differently and look around corners for ways to serve customers.
They benchmark themselves and their teams against the best.

We track the representation of our workforce because we know that diversity helps us build the best possible customer experiences and products for our globally diverse customer base.

Our workforce data We track representation across our workforce because we know that having a team that reflects our customers and communities helps us build the best possible customer experience and products for our globally diverse customer base.
United by our peculiar culture of curiosity, bold ownership and fearless initiative, we channel our customer obsession into making everyday impact—big and small.
Together at Amazon We're committed to building a company that delivers the best range of products for our broad customer base.
Every Amazonian, from warehouse floor to corporate HQ, shares a drive to impact the future, today.
We’re proud to create great jobs with industry-leading benefits, including things like health care on day one for regular full-time employees.
Together at Amazon helps us do that by empowering employees to grow, thrive, and connect through customized recommendations for programs, resources, and engagement opportunities.
Our unmatched scale offers every employee endless opportunities to reimagine how customers shop, stream, eat, connect and live.
Upskilling We’re investing billions of dollars to help our employees and our neighbors prepare for the jobs of the future.
The annual ranking recognizes Amazon's investment in career growth, education access, and local communities—backed by a $2.5 billion skills training commitment.
Safety The safety of our employees and partners is our top priority and integral to everything that we do at Amazon—every day, in every operation, across every country.
We offer free public tours to show what happens behind the scenes in our fulfillment centers around the world.
